assessment_objectives.objective: the content of the audit records needed to support the ability to uniquely trace users to their actions is defined.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters:
successful and unsuccessful account logon events, account management events, object access, policy change, privilege functions, process tracking, and system events.

For Web applications: all administrator activity, authentication checks, authorization checks, data deletions, data access, data changes, and permission changes

assessment_objectives.objective: audit records contain information that establishes the identity of any individuals, subjects or objects/entities associated with the event.
